entities.name: 3-slot emoji system
entities.context: Title format using state, type, and content emojis (e.g., ✅ 📌 🏗️) for conversation thread classification

entities.name: thread-close
entities.context: Skill for closing normal interactive conversation threads with tier detection, position extraction, and AAR generation

entities.name: drop-close
entities.context: Skill for closing Pulse Drop worker threads, writes structured deposit JSON for orchestrator review

entities.name: build-close
entities.context: Skill for post-build synthesis after Pulse builds complete

entities.name: Pulse
entities.context: Automated build orchestration system that spawns headless workers (Drops) in parallel

entities.name: router.py
entities.context: Auto-detection script that routes to correct close skill (thread-close, drop-close, or build-close) based on SESSION_STATE

entities.name: emoji.py
entities.context: Python module with helper functions for title generation using the 3-slot emoji system

entities.name: emoji-legend.json
entities.context: Configuration file containing emoji definitions, slot structure, and detection hints for thread titles

entities.name: SESSION_STATE
entities.context: Markdown file tracking conversation state including drop_id, build_slug, and orchestrator context

entities.name: Tier system
entities.context: Three-level complexity classification for thread closes: Tier 1 (simple), Tier 2 (standard), Tier 3 (complex builds)

entities.name: Deposits
entities.context: Structured JSON output from Drop workers containing summary, artifacts, learnings, concerns, and decisions

entities.name: Drops
entities.context: Headless worker threads spawned via /zo/ask by Pulse orchestrator

entities.name: Orchestrator
entities.context: Parent thread that coordinates worker Drops and handles commits after deposit collection

entities.name: Context guards
entities.context: Fail-safe validation that detects wrong skill invocation and suggests correct alternative

entities.name: Parent context
entities.context: Square bracket notation in titles linking workers to their parent build or orchestrator thread

entities.name: AAR
entities.context: After-Action Report generated during Tier 3 thread closes for complex work

entities.name: Position extraction
entities.context: Process of extracting belief candidates from conversations during Tier 3 closes

relationships.context: Generates titles using state/type/content emoji format
Generates titles with worker emoji (👷🏽‍♂️) and build context in brackets
Drops are spawned by Pulse and deposit JSON is detected by Pulse tick loop
Writes structured deposit JSON to N5/builds/<slug>/deposits/
Orchestrator spawns Drops and handles their commits after reviewing deposits
Detects tier (1-3) based on artifact count and conversation complexity
Routes to thread-close when no drop_id or build_slug present
Routes to drop-close when drop_id detected in SESSION_STATE
Routes to build-close when build_slug present without drop_id
Validates that thread-close is not called for Drop contexts
Validates that drop-close is called only for Drop contexts
Loads emoji definitions from config file for title generation
Square brackets containing build/parent title appear between emojis and semantic title
Generates After-Action Report for Tier 3 complex work closes
Extracts belief candidates during Tier 3 closes
Aggregates all deposits for post-build synthesis
